global_description: A medium-sized nocturnal bird with a mottled brown, gray, and black plumage, providing excellent camouflage. It has a rounded body, short neck, and a large, flat head. The wings are long and pointed, and the tail is slightly rounded with white tips.

part_details.head: Large, flat, with a wide mouth and small, dark eyes, covered in mottled feathers.
part_details.wings: Long, pointed, with a mix of brown, gray, and black feathers.
part_details.tail: Slightly rounded with distinctive white tips on the outer feathers.
part_details.body: Rounded, compact, with a mottled pattern for camouflage.
part_details.plumage: Mottled brown, gray, and black, providing excellent camouflage against forest floors.

spatial_relations: The large flat head is positioned at the front of the rounded body.
The long pointed wings extend from the sides of the body.
The slightly rounded tail with white tips is at the rear of the body.
